notes: #518 next-gate (item #2) SHIPPED on branch claude/continue-work-bo69h2: deterministic directive one-sentence salvage (lib/briefing/generator.ts applyDirectiveOneSentenceSalvage, wired into validateGeneratedArtifact before the one-sentence check).
